name: Coca Cola Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cut-up chicken in an ungreased skillet.
2. Mix together 3/4 cup of Coca-Cola and 1 cup of catsup.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Uncover and cook for another hour or until tender.
(This tastes just like barbecue chicken) Do not add salt.
